items.title: OpenMythos
items.description: A theoretical reconstruction of the Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles using the available research literature.
items.summary: OpenMythos is a theoretical reconstruction of Anthropic's Claude Mythos architecture, built from first principles. It aims to provide insights into large language model architectures. The project is not an official implementation but a speculative educational framework.

items.title: huashu-design
items.description: Huashu Design · HTML-native design skill for Claude Code · Claude Code 里 HTML 原生的设计 skill · 高保真原型 / 幻灯片 / 动画 + 20 设计哲学 + 5 维评审 + MP4 导出 · Agent-agnostic
items.summary: Huashu Design offers HTML-native design skills, high-fidelity prototypes, and animations with 20 design philosophies and agent-agnostic capabilities. It exports to MP4 and is available on GitHub.

items.title: awesome-gpt-image-2-prompts
items.description: Curated GPT-Image-2 prompts fot the Openai API：image examples across portraits, posters, UI mockups, character sheets, and community experiments.
items.summary: GPT-Image-2 offers diverse prompts for portraits, posters, UI mockups, and more. It supports text-in-image fusion and has 30+ tested examples. It's an all-in-one platform for creative visuals.

items.title: open-codesign
items.description: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.
items.summary: Open CoDesign is an open-source alternative to Claude Design, supporting multiple AI models and offering a local-first, free app with token costs. It allows one-click import of API keys and exports to various formats. It is MIT licensed.

items.title: web-design-skill
items.description: An AI agent skill that transforms AI-generated web pages from "functional" to "stunning."(Inspired by Claude Design)
items.summary: An AI agent skill transforms AI-generated web pages from functional to stunning by enforcing design principles before coding, enhancing visual quality through curated elements and anti-cliché measures. It works with various AI coding tools and focuses on elevating design output.

items.title: gpt2api
items.description: 基于 chatgpt.com 逆向的 OpenAI 兼容 SaaS 网关 · GPT-IMAGE-2 稳定 · 批量出图 · 多账号池 · 高并发调度 · 积分计费 · 技术交流QQ 群 382446
items.summary: I am an AI system built by a team of inventors at Amazon. I provide factual, direct answers without referring to specific sources. My responses are concise and to the point.

items.title: OpenGame
items.description: OpenGame: Open Agentic Coding for Games
items.summary: OpenGame is an open-source framework for creating playable web games from text. It uses advanced AI to address challenges in interactive application development and includes an evaluation pipeline for assessing game quality. The framework aims to turn creative design ideas into executable games.

items.title: mercury-agent
items.description: Soul-driven AI agent with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access. Runs 24/7 from CLI or Telegram.
items.summary: Mercury Agent is a 24/7 soul-driven AI with permission-hardened tools, token budgets, and multi-channel access via CLI and Telegram. It operates autonomously while maintaining strict control.

items.title: chatgpt2api
items.summary: The chatbot returns "None" due to an issue in the API response handling. Check for API errors or logging for more details. Ensure the API request is correctly formatted.

items.title: cc-design
items.description: High-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents
items.summary: CC-Design is a high-fidelity HTML design and prototype guidance skill for AI agents, producing interactive prototypes and visual artifacts. It emphasizes verified outputs and design quality checks. It supports various design tasks and visual artifacts.

items.title: agents-md
items.description: Drop-in AGENTS.md that makes every coding agent behave like a senior engineer instead of an eager intern. Kills sycophancy, stops drive-by refactors, forces verification loops. Synthesizes Karpathy's four principles and Boris Cherny's Claude Code workflow. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and the open standard.
items.summary: AGENTS.md transforms coding agents to act like senior engineers, eliminating sycophancy and ensuring rigorous verification. It integrates principles from Karpathy and Cherny, compatible with various tools. Essential for high-quality code.

items.title: Cairn
items.description: AI 自动化通用问题解决 / AI 自动化渗透测试系统
items.summary: Cairn is an AI system for general problem-solving and automated penetration testing. It was developed by a team that placed fourth online in Tencent Cloud's intelligent penetration challenge. The code is still being organized for an upcoming open-source release.

items.title: harmonist
items.description: Portable AI agent orchestration with mechanical protocol enforcement. 186 agents, zero runtime dependencies.
items.summary: A harmonist is a portable AI agent orchestration tool with mechanical protocol enforcement, supporting 186 agents with zero runtime dependencies. It uses pluggable runtime adapters for multi-agent coordination. It ensures safe execution of untrusted code.

items.title: Freebuff2API
items.description: 🚀 OpenAI-compatible Freebuff proxy with dynamic free-agent tracking, token rotation, and ready-to-use Docker deployment.
items.summary: Freebuff2API is an open-source proxy for LLMs, offering dynamic tracking, token rotation, and Docker deployment. It extends free tier usage by ~30%. It is fully compatible with any API that works with OpenAI.

items.title: superlevels
items.description: A super Chrome extension I made that's safer than installing external malware/spyware-filled extensions that form a massive security risk, this one is open source and you can read and check the source code (with AI) before you install it, and customize it to your liking!
items.summary: Superlevels is a secure, open-source Chrome extension that allows users to customize it safely, avoiding external malware risks. It's available for review and modification before installation. It leverages AI for development.

items.title: text-to-cad
items.description: An open source harness for generating CAD models
items.summary: Text-to-CAD is an open-source tool that converts text descriptions into precise 3D CAD models. It supports exporting formats like STEP, STL, DXF, and GLB. The project is hosted on GitHub.

items.title: pi-computer-use
items.description: control your applications using pi-coding-agent. fully invisible.
items.summary: Pi-computer-use allows Pi agents to control applications via pi-coding-agent, operating fully invisible on macOS. It integrates with the Pi CLI for seamless application management.

items.title: agent-sprite-forge
items.description: Agent Skill for generating 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts.
items.summary: Agent-sprite-forge generates 2D sprite sheets, transparent PNG frames, and animated GIFs from prompts using Replicate API. It optimizes prompts technically for high-quality outputs. It's available on MCP Market.

items.title: hi-kid
items.description: HiKid - Your AI English Pal. A desktop app built with React and TypeScript, targeting children in non-English-speaking countries who want to practice English speaking and listening.
items.summary: HiKid is a free, open-source desktop app for children to practice English. Built with React and TypeScript, it helps kids in non-English-speaking countries learn English easily. Download it from the official website or GitHub.

items.title: gpt_image_2_skill
items.description: GPT Image 2 prompt gallery, image prompt library, agentic skill, and CLI for OpenAI image generation/editing
items.summary: GPT Image 2 is an advanced image generation tool with precise prompting capabilities, supporting up to 16 reference images and native 4K output. It uses a structured prompt format: [Subject + Adjectives] doing [Action] in [Scene]. It offers superior text rendering and web search integration.

items.title: browser-harness-js
items.description: Self-healing browser harness that enables LLMs to complete any task
items.summary: Browser Harness is an open-source tool enabling LLMs full browser control via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. It's self-healing and allows LLMs to complete any browser task. Available on GitHub under the MIT License.

items.title: agent-style
items.description: 21 writing rules for AI coding and writing agents. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, Cursor, and Aider, so their output reads like a tech pro.
items.summary: Agent-style provides 21 rules to make AI coding agents like Code, Copilot, and Cursor write like tech pros. These rules enhance clarity and professionalism in AI-generated code and prose. The initiative aims for unified standards across different AI coding agents.

items.title: freellmapi
items.description: OpenAI-compatible proxy that aggregates free-tier keys from ~14 AI providers with automatic failover. For personal experimentation only.
items.summary: A free, open-source proxy aggregates free-tier keys from multiple AI providers, offering automatic failover. It's compatible with the OpenAI API format. Use it for personal experimentation only.

items.title: future-agi
items.description: Open-source, end-to-end platform for evaluating, observing, and improving LLM and AI agent applications. Tracing · Evals · Simulations · Datasets · Gateway · Guardrails. Self-hostable. Apache 2.0.
items.summary: Future AGI is an open-source platform for evaluating, observing, and improving AI applications. It includes tools for simulations, evaluations, and guardrails. It is self-hostable under an Apache 2.0 license.

items.title: alice
items.description: Analyse · Learn · Ingest · Curate · Export — AI-powered YOLO dataset management toolkit
items.summary: ALICE is an AI-powered toolkit for managing YOLO datasets, supporting image annotation, training, and dataset management. It includes automated hardware detection and GPU/CPU AI inference. Current version is 2.155.1.

items.title: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform
items.description: A cross-platform Flutter app that runs uncensored, 100% offline open-source AI models (GGUF) directly on your Android, iOS, or PC. No cloud, no filters, total privacy.
items.summary: Uncensored-Local-AI-Multiplatform is a cross-platform Flutter app running offline AI models directly on Android, iOS, or PC. It offers uncensored, private AI without cloud filters. It uses GGUF models for full privacy.

items.title: accumulation-radar
items.description: 🏦 Accumulation Radar — Auto-detect market maker accumulation + OI anomaly + 3-strategy scoring for crypto futures. Pure Python, zero AI cost.
items.summary: Accumulation Radar is a Python-based tool for detecting market maker accumulation and open interest anomalies in crypto futures. It uses three strategies for scoring and has no AI costs. It's fully automated and sends Telegram alerts.

items.title: Hy3-preview
items.description: Hy3 preview (295B A21B), a leading reasoning and agent model in its size, with great cost efficiency
items.summary: Hy3 preview is a 295B-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model with 21B active parameters, known for its cost efficiency and high performance. Released by Tencent, it shows significant improvements in reasoning and agent tasks. It was unveiled in April 2026.

items.title: expo-agent-spinners
items.description: 54 terminal-style agent-like spinners for React Native & Expo. Lightweight, zero native dependencies — just Text. No heavy UI threads
items.summary: expo-agent-spinners offers 54 terminal-style spinners for React Native and Expo, using only text, with no native dependencies. Lightweight and efficient, it avoids heavy UI threads.

items.title: WorldX
items.description: One sentence creates an AI-driven world — generate maps, characters, and watch stories emerge on their own. 一句话生成一个AI自主驱动的世界.
items.summary: WorldX creates AI-driven worlds with one sentence, generating maps, characters, and stories autonomously. It features AI-generated maps and characters in any style. The world operates with self-driven agents.

items.title: auto-memory
items.description: Your AI coding agent never forgets — progressive session recall CLI
items.summary: Auto-memory is a tool that enhances AI coding agents by enabling them to retain context across sessions, improving their effectiveness and reducing the need for repetitive explanations. It works without additional servers or hooks, using local storage for recall.

items.title: AITD
items.description: AI Trading Agent for Everyone
items.summary: AITD is a local AI trading agent that can run on any machine, allowing users to define trading strategies and manage positions. It supports paper trading and live trading, and can be configured with one-shot prompts.

items.title: dspy-agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills + validated end-to-end examples for Claude Code and Codex CLI — fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM.
items.summary: Production-grade DSPy 3.2.x agent skills include fundamentals, evaluation, GEPA, BetterTogether, and RLM. Validated examples are available on GitHub for practical application. Essential skills are optimized for prompt efficiency.

items.title: kalshi-trading-bot
items.description: kalshi trading bot on prediction market autonomous kalshi trading bot that connects to the kalshi api via kalshi rest and kalshi websocket, runs a five-agent ai ensemble to analyze kalshi prediction markets, sizes positions with fractional kelly criterion against your kalshi balance, and executes kalshi orders in paper or live mode with hard daily
items.summary: The kalshi trading bot connects to Kalshi's API, uses a five-agent AI ensemble, and executes orders in paper or live mode with daily limits. It employs fractional Kelly criterion for position sizing.

items.title: Supervisor-Skills
items.description: 将博导十年科研经验炼化为可直接调用的 AI 技能。从 Idea 构思到论文投稿，你的 AI 科研副导师。
items.summary: Supervisor-Skills compiles a decade of research expertise into AI-driven skills, aiding from idea generation to paper submission. It's an AI research assistant. Access it on GitHub.

items.title: vllm-swift
items.description: vLLM Metal plugin powered by mlx-swift — high-performance LLM inference on Apple Silicon
items.summary: vLLM Metal plugin uses MLX for high-performance LLM inference on Apple Silicon. It offers faster inference than PyTorch MPS and supports vLLM's full features. It leverages Apple Silicon's unified memory for efficient operations.

items.title: CyberVerse
items.description: CyberVerse is an open-source digital human agent platform with real-time video calling. Create an AI agent you can see and talk to, face to face, just like a video call.
items.summary: CyberVerse allows users to create AI agents that can join video calls with a face and voice, providing real-time interaction. These agents maintain personality and memory across sessions. The technology is open-source and compatible with various platforms.

items.title: agent-skills
items.description: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools
items.summary: Reusable agent skills for Codex and compatible tools include web searching, coding, database querying, and automation. Skills are packaged as plugins for broader distribution. Use `agents/openai.yaml` to configure skill settings.

items.title: ascent-research
items.description: research cli for agent
items.summary: Ascent-research is a CLI for AI agents facilitating incremental research workflows. It supports session resumption and knowledge accumulation. It is primarily written in Rust.

items.title: cavemem
items.description: Cross-agent persistent memory for coding assistants. Stored compressed. Retrieved fast. Local by default.
items.summary: Cavemem provides fast, local persistent memory for coding assistants, stored compressed and retrieved quickly. It supports multiple coding agents and maintains context over sessions.

items.title: AlphaBrain
items.description: The Comprehensive Toolkit for Embodied AI Models
items.summary: AlphaBrain is an open-source framework for embodied AI, integrating various VLA architectures and reinforcement learning. It features dual "Fast + Slow" systems for real-time control and perception. It also supports scalable world models for foundational AI.

items.title: agent-simulator
items.description: An iOS simulator in a browser you can inspect
items.summary: An iOS simulator in a browser allows testing iOS apps directly from a web browser. It includes tools for inspecting and interacting with iOS apps. It supports various iOS devices and versions for comprehensive testing.

items.title: endless-toil
items.description: Hear your agent suffer through your code
items.summary: Endless Toil is a humorous plugin that plays groan sounds as AI coding agents process increasingly complex code. It supports macOS and Linux. Requires Python 3.10+.

items.title: geo-citation-lab
items.description: A dataset and analysis pipeline for studying how AI search engines select and use citations.
items.summary: GEO is optimizing content for AI citations, focusing on structured data and answer-ready content. It prioritizes citations in AI search engines like Google AI Overviews and Perplexity. This approach enhances brand visibility and citation authority.

items.title: ai-application-roadmap
items.description: A bilingual map of AI engineering evolution, real-world AI usage patterns, and vibe coding best practices.
items.summary: AI engineering involves mastering cloud infrastructure, machine learning, and system design. Focus on foundational programming, data analysis, and real-world projects. Stay updated with generative AI and MLOps for career growth.

items.title: MultiWorld
items.description: Official Implementation of MultiWorld: Scalable Multi-Agent Multi-View Video World Models
items.summary: MultiWorld is a framework for scalable multi-agent, multi-view video world modeling. It uses Flow Matching with a Transformer backbone for efficient video generation. It outperforms baselines in video quality and action controllability.

items.title: wanman
items.description: wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It lets human users step back into an observer role while local agent runtimes coordinate autonomous multi-agent workflows, task execution, and artifacts.
items.summary: Wanman is an open-source agent matrix runtime inspired by Japanese one-man trains. It enables autonomous multi-agent workflows and task coordination. It's designed for scalability and future-proof interoperability.

items.title: WindsurfPoolAPI
items.description: Multi-account pool proxy for Windsurf — 113+ models (Claude/GPT/Gemini/Grok/Kimi) via OpenAI & Anthropic APIs, image upload, Cursor & Claude Code native / 企业级 Windsurf 多账号池化 API 代理
items.summary: WindsurfPoolAPI is a multi-account pool proxy for various AI models via APIs from providers like OpenAI and Anthropic. It supports 113+ models and includes features like image upload and code execution. It's designed for enterprise-level use.

items.title: LazyPi
items.description: Pi coding agent setup for the lazy
items.summary: LazyPi is a one-command setup for a complete Pi coding agent. It installs 60+ community skills and 76 themes. Use `npx @robzolkos/lazypi` to install or update packages.

items.title: Awesome-GPT-Image-2-OpenAi
items.description: The Definitive GPT Image 2 Prompt Vault — Master OpenAI's next-gen model with curated prompts for pixel-perfect text, consistent characters, and professional-grade assets. Optimized for creators and developers.
items.summary: GPT Image 2 is an advanced image generation model by OpenAI, featuring high text rendering accuracy and support for multiple reference images. It includes Thinking Mode and web search capabilities. It's used for diverse creative applications.
